name: Quicksilver Cash Rewards

verdict.text: No annual fee, flat 1.5% cash back — an easy long-term keep

earn_rates.category: Hotels, vacation rentals & rental cars — via Capital One Travel

earn_note: The 1.5% flat base with no rotating categories is the whole pitch. Comes with a one-time $200 cash bonus for spending $500 in the first 3 months. Since May 2026, Capital One has been quietly migrating some Quicksilver and QuicksilverOne accounts (those who got an email notice) onto the Discover network, adding an unlimited 3% cash back category at grocery stores and gas stations on top of the existing 1.5% base and 5% travel rate — not universal yet, and cardholders can opt out and keep their current card.

redemption_options.method: Statement credit, check, direct deposit, or gift cards

points.note: Straight 1¢-per-point cash back with no minimum redemption and no expiration while the account stays open — there's no premium-card multiplier to chase since this isn't part of a transferable Capital One Miles pool.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer currency — this is straight cash back, not Capital One Miles.

insurance.detail: Doubles eligible manufacturer warranties of ≤1 yr, up to 24 months total
Up to $1M · when fare is charged to the card

protection_note: A solid suite for a no-fee card — purchase protection, doubled extended warranty, and even price protection, none of which most $0 cash-back cards bother with. No trip cancellation/interruption, baggage, or medical coverage, so it's still not a travel-card substitute.
rental_note: Secondary auto rental collision/theft coverage, up to 31 days — pays out after your personal auto policy. Decline the counter's CDW/LDW and charge the entire rental to this card to activate it; excludes luxury/exotic vehicles and business or peer-to-peer rentals.

status_perks.name: Hertz Five Star status
status_perks.note: Skip-the-counter access and a wider vehicle selection at select Hertz locations — a nice-to-have, not a real upgrade guarantee.

services.name: 0% intro APR
services.detail: 0% for 15 months on purchases and balance transfers, then 18.49%–28.49% variable ongoing.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees
services.detail: $0 on purchases made outside the US.

services.name: Complimentary concierge
services.detail: 24/7, 365-day concierge for dining, entertainment, and travel arrangements.

services.name: $200 welcome bonus
services.detail: One-time $200 cash bonus after spending $500 on purchases within the first 3 months.

additional_cards.title: Additional cards

benefits.text: Earns cash back on their spend (into your account)
Same purchase protection as the primary card

additional_cards.note: No cost to add users — a simple way to consolidate household spend onto the flat 1.5% base.

timeline.text: Capital One begins mailing Discover-network replacement cards to select Quicksilver and QuicksilverOne accounts, adding an unlimited 3% cash back category at grocery stores and gas stations. Affected old Mastercards stopped working July 9, 2026; the change is opt-out, not universal, and the $0/$39 annual fees are unchanged.
Capital One completes its acquisition of Discover Financial Services, setting up the network migration above.
